passives.name: Reap
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] apply a ''Reap'' stack to the target, stacking infinitely and lasting for the remainder of the combat phase, and deal {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} equal to {{as|{{rd|{{fd|0.7}}%|{{fd|0.5}}%}} (+ {{fd|0.1}}% per target's ''Reap'' stack) of the target's '''maximum''' health}}. Additionally, the target is inflicted a [[Health#Health threshold|health threshold]] equal to {{as|100% of their '''maximum''' health}} minus the '''total''' amount of '''bonus''' damage dealt against them, lasting until the end of the round and capped at a threshold of {{as|50% of their '''maximum''' health}}.

passives.name: Sow
passives.effects: Increases the {{as|attack speed}} gained from all sources by 15%.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks apply a Reap stack (infinite, lasts for combat phase).
On-hit, deal bonus true damage equal to 0.7% (0.5% ranged) of target max health plus 0.1% per Reap stack.
Target health threshold equals 100% max health minus total bonus damage dealt, capped at 50% max health, lasting until end of round.
Increases attack speed gained from all sources by 15%.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: each basic attack on-hit applies a persistent Reap stack for the combat phase and simultaneously recalculates bonus true damage from target maximum health plus per-stack scaling.
Player-visible behavior: repeated hits progressively lower the target's health-threshold floor for the round (down to a 50% maximum-health floor), creating a sustained anti-frontline execute window.
Patch-history verification confirms this file's current ranged/melee baseline and attack-speed gain semantics for the latest Arena tuning.
